title: Module 1
content:
Introduction to Additive Manufacturing (AM)– Process, Materials,
Applications- Modular Design and Topology–Customization, Efficiency,
Scalability - Design freedom in AM– Complex Geometries, Lightweight
Structures, Material Efficiency -Benefits of Topology Design Freedom–
Performance Enhancement, Innovation, Sustainability

title: Module 2
content:
CAD for AM, Integration of CAD with Additive Manufacturing, Design for
AM, Topology Optimization, Metal AM physics and processes – PBF, DED,
Binder Jetting, Sheet Lamination. Laser and Extrusion – SLS, SLM, DMLS,
FDM, Robocasting. Metal AM processes, Filament, Powder and Sheet
Systems,
Metal
AM
as
an
Extension
of
Welding
Techniques
(GTAW/GMAW).

title: Module 3
content:
Metal AM physics and processes, Directed Energy, Binder and Material
Jetting Feedstocks, Metallurgy and properties of materials– Microstructure,
Mechanical, Thermal and Chemical Properties, Post processing and testing –
Heat Treatment, Hot Isostatic Pressing, Machining, Surface Treatment and
NDT Methods.

title: Module 4
content:
Reverse Engineering for metal AM, Data Handling, Simulation and
Analysis, Modelling for AM –Support Structures, Functional Integration,
Value analysis – Cost, Time, Performance and Sustainability -Future of
metal AM
